title: SRS Source Document Sidecar (ext:repository)
description: Metadata sidecar for a source document in source-documents/. The sidecar file has the same base name as the source file with .meta.json appended.

documentId.description: Stable identifier. Used as sourceId in SourceReferences with sourceType 'repository-document'.

contentPath.description: Relative path from source-documents/ to the document file. MAY contain forward-slash-separated sub-path segments (e.g., 'audio/meeting.mp4'); implementations MUST resolve it relative to sourceDocumentsPath (RFC-017 [R9]).

encoding.description: Character encoding of the content file, e.g. 'utf-8'.

processingNote.description: Caveats about quality or completeness of the source material.

excerpt.description: Optional repository-local excerpt provenance. The content file is a frozen captured snippet from another source document in the same repository.

sourceDocumentId.description: documentId of the repository-local parent source document this excerpt was captured from.

capturedAt.description: When the excerpt was extracted from the parent source.

capturedBy.description: Who or what extracted the excerpt.

sourceChecksumAtCapture.description: Optional digest of the parent source content at extraction time: '<algorithm>:<hex>'.

date.description: Date the source document was produced or recorded.

importedAt.description: Timestamp when this document was imported into the repository.

kind.description: How the excerpt location is expressed in the parent source document.

note.description: Optional human-readable clarification about the locator.
